ddls:
CREATE TABLE "insurance_companies" (
  "company_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each insurance company */,
  "company_name" TEXT /* Name of the insurance company */,
  "contact_info" TEXT /* Contact information for the insurance company */,
  "rating" REAL /* Rating of the insurance company */,
  "license_number" TEXT /* License number of the insurance company */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the insurance company */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the insurance company is located */,
  "state" TEXT /* State where the insurance company is located */,
  "zip_code" TEXT /* Zip code of the insurance company */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("company_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "demographics" (
  "demographic_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each demographic profile */,
  "marital_status" TEXT /* Marital status of the profile */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the profile */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the profile */,
  "income" INTEGER /* Income of the profile */,
  "occupation" TEXT /* Occupation of the profile */,
  "education" TEXT /* Education level of the profile */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("demographic_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "insurance_rates" (
  "rate_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each insurance rate */,
  "company_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the insurance company */,
  "demographic_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the demographic profile */,
  "rate" REAL /* Insurance rate for the demographic profile */,
  "policy_term" TEXT /* Term of the insurance policy */,
  "coverage_limit" INTEGER /* Coverage limit of the insurance policy */,
  "deductible" INTEGER /* Deductible of the insurance policy */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rate_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_insurance_rates_company_id FOREIGN KEY ("company_id") REFERENCES insurance_companies ("company_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_insurance_rates_demographic_id FOREIGN KEY ("demographic_id") REFERENCES demographics ("demographic_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., broker, client, admin) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password of the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role FOREIGN KEY ("role") REFERENCES roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "rate_updates" (
  "update_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each rate update */,
  "rate_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the insurance rate being updated */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who made the update */,
  "update_date" TEXT /* Date when the update was made */,
  "previous_rate" REAL /* Previous insurance rate */,
  "new_rate" REAL /* New insurance rate */,
  "update_reason" TEXT /* Reason for the rate update */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("update_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_rate_updates_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_rate_updates_rate_id FOREIGN KEY ("rate_id") REFERENCES insurance_rates ("rate_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "client_profiles" (
  "client_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each client profile */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user associated with the profile */,
  "demographic_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the demographic profile of the client */,
  "insurance_needs" TEXT /* Insurance needs of the client */,
  "premium_payment_method" TEXT /* Method of premium payment (e.g., monthly, annually) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("client_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_client_profiles_demographic_id FOREIGN KEY ("demographic_id") REFERENCES demographics ("demographic_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_client_profiles_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "rate_comparisons" (
  "comparison_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each rate comparison */,
  "client_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the client profile */,
  "rate_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the insurance rate */,
  "comparison_date" TEXT /* Date when the comparison was made */,
  "premium_difference" REAL /* Difference in premium between the compared rates */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("comparison_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_rate_comparisons_client_id FOREIGN KEY ("client_id") REFERENCES client_profiles ("client_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_rate_comparisons_rate_id FOREIGN KEY ("rate_id") REFERENCES insurance_rates ("rate_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who generated the report */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of report (e.g., trend analysis, comparison) */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date when the report was generated */,
  "data" TEXT /* Data included in the report */,
  "report_format" TEXT /* Format of the report (e.g., PDF, CSV) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions associated with the role */,
  "role_description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "permissions" (
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each permission */,
  "permission_name" TEXT /* Name of the permission */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the permission */,
  "permission_type" TEXT /* Type of permission (e.g., read, write, delete) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permission_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "role_permissions" (
  "role_permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the role-permission association */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the role */,
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the permission */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_permission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_role_permissions_permission_id FOREIGN KEY ("permission_id") REFERENCES permissions ("permission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_role_permissions_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "audit_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each audit log */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who performed the action */,
  "action_type" TEXT /* Type of action performed */,
  "action_date" TEXT /* Date when the action was performed */,
  "details" TEXT /* Details of the action */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user who performed the action */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notifications" (
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each notification */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user receiving the notification */,
  "message" TEXT /* Message content of the notification */,
  "send_date" TEXT /* Date when the notification was sent */,
  "notification_type" TEXT /* Type of notification (e.g., email, SMS) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "system_settings" (
  "setting_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each system setting */,
  "setting_name" TEXT /* Name of the system setting */,
  "setting_value" TEXT /* Value of the system setting */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("setting_id")
)
